headline: Disney (DIS) Has A Movies Problem, But Here’s How Its Parks Are Solving It
summary: Walt Disney Co (NYSE:DIS) is one of the 12 Best Dow Stocks to Invest In Right Now. On July 2, Ric Prentiss, an analyst at Raymond James, lowered the firm’s price target on Walt Disney Co (NYSE:DIS) to $111 from $119 and kept an Outperform rating on the stock.
